summary: Iteration 15 - Conversion Layer UI Testing. All 5 main conversion layer features passed: Hero section with headline/benefits/CTAs, Bundle offer section with price/badge/Buy Now, Get Bundle scroll, Buy Now adds to cart with toast, Post-game conversion prompt in MixUp game. Login flow has a minor frontend bug (sends 'email' instead of 'identifier' to API).

ui_bugs.issue: Login form sends 'email' field instead of 'identifier' to /api/auth/login - API expects 'identifier'

action_items: Fix AuthPage login form to send 'identifier' instead of 'email' to /api/auth/login endpoint
critical_code_review_comments: SoulFoodApp.js: Lines 554-634 - Hero section correctly implements data-testid='hero-section', headline, 3 benefits, CTAs, non-denominational note
SoulFoodApp.js: Lines 1109-1195 - Bundle offer section correctly implements data-testid='bundle-offer-section', title, Best Value badge, $21.99 price, Buy Now button
MixUpGame.js: Lines 574-595 - Post-game conversion prompt correctly implements data-testid='post-game-conversion', 'Enjoyed this?', 'Get Full Access', 'View Bundle' buttons
TrickyTestamentGame.js: Lines 421-442 - Post-game conversion prompt correctly implements same pattern as MixUpGame
context_for_next_testing_agent: Conversion layer UI elements all working. Hero section, bundle offer, post-game conversion prompts verified. Login form has minor bug - sends 'email' instead of 'identifier'. Games accessible at /gaming-central, /game/mixup, /game/tricky-testament.

hero_section.details: Hero section at data-testid='hero-section' with headline 'Bible Study That Sticks', 3 numbered benefits, 'Get the Bundle' and 'Start Free Lesson' CTAs, non-denominational note

bundle_offer_section.details: Bundle section at data-testid='bundle-offer-section' with '4C's + Break*fast Starter Bundle' title, 'Best Value' badge, $21.99 price, 'Save $4.99' badge, 'Buy Now — $21.99' button

get_bundle_scroll.details: 'Get the Bundle' hero button scrolls smoothly to #bundle-offer section

buy_now_cart.details: 'Buy Now' button adds bundle to cart with toast 'Bundle added to cart!'

post_game_conversion_mixup.details: MixUp game shows post-game conversion prompt with 'Enjoyed this?', 'Get Full Access', 'View Bundle' buttons after game over

post_game_conversion_tricky.details: TrickyTestamentGame.js contains same post-game conversion pattern (lines 421-442)

login_header_buttons.details: Login form sends 'email' instead of 'identifier' - API returns validation error. Backend API works correctly with curl.
